channel.title: Xinyun Zettelkasten — Literature Notes
channel.description: Notes from things I read, watch, and learn from.

item.title: 满分答卷，零分能力 — 当AI考满分却一题没做
item.description: Berkeley RDI proved a bot can score 100% on top AI benchmarks without solving a single task. What Goodhart's Law means for how we evaluate AI agents. Written in Chinese.
